widgets.name: Modern Clock
widgets.description: A high-fidelity glass clock showing the current time and date. No permissions required.
widgets.author: Vyntra Team

widgets.name: CPU Monitor
widgets.description: Live CPU, RAM, GPU VRAM and disk usage monitor with heat-reactive amber highlights above 85%.
widgets.author: Vyntra Team

widgets.name: Notes
widgets.description: Persistent sticky note with 600 ms auto-save debounce. Your text survives restarts.
widgets.author: Vyntra Team

widgets.name: Pomodoro
widgets.description: Focus timer with configurable work and break durations, animated ring and persistent session counter.
widgets.author: Vyntra Team

widgets.name: App Launcher
widgets.description: Quick-launch grid with live search for installed Win32 and UWP applications, including their icons.
widgets.author: Vyntra Team

widgets.name: Now Playing
widgets.description: Shows the current track from any Windows media source via SMTC, with artwork and playback controls.
widgets.author: Vyntra Team
